response.overview: Peter Parker is just your average high schooler, until one day he got bitten by a radioactive spider and got the superpowers of a Spider and turned into The Amazing Spider-Man! Meanwhile Herman (The Shocker) and Dimitri (The Chameleon) are selling Oscorp tech on the black market to get by. Herman and Dimitri plan to take down Norman and get revenge. And Spider-Man has to take them down before they get to Norman Osborn.
response.title: Spider-Man: Origins
